segments.text: "David sang the words of this song to the Lord on the day when the Lord saved him from all his enemies, and from Saul.
"He sang:
The Lord is my rock, my fortress, and my Savior.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: He is my God, my rock who protects me. He shields me from harm, his power saves me,  he keeps me safe. He is my protector; he is my savior; he saves me from violence.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I call for help from the Lord, who should be praised, and he saves me from those who hate me.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: The waves of death swept over me; surging waters of destruction flooded over me;
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: The grave wound its ropes around me; death set snares for me.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: In my despair I called on the Lord; I called out to my God. He heard my voice from his Temple; my cry for help reached his ears.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: The earth shook to and fro; the foundations of the heavens trembled, shaking because of his anger.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Smoke came out of his nostrils, and fire from his mouth, burning coals that blazed before him.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: He pushed aside the heavens and came down, with dark clouds beneath his feet.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Riding on a heavenly being he flew, swooping on the wings of the wind.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: He hid himself in darkness, covering himself with black rainclouds.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Burning coals blazed out of his brightness.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: The Lord thundered from heaven; the voice of the Most High resounded.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: He fired his arrows, scattering his enemies,  he routed them with his lightning bolts.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: The Lord roared, and by the wind from the breath of his nostrils the valleys of the sea could be seen and the foundations of the earth were uncovered.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: He reached down his hand from above and grabbed hold of me. He dragged me out of the deep water.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: He rescued me from my powerful enemies, from those who hated me and who were much stronger than me.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: They came at me at my worst possible moment,  but the Lord supported me.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: He set me free,  he rescued me because he's happy with me.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: The Lord rewarded me because I do what's right; he repaid me because I am innocent.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: For I have followed the Lord's ways; I have not sinned by turning away from my God.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I have kept all his laws in mind; I have not ignored his commandments.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I am blameless in his sight; I keep myself from sinning.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: The Lord rewarded me for doing what's right. I am innocent in his sight.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: You show trust to those who are trusting; you show integrity to those with integrity,
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: You show yourself pure to those who are pure, but you show yourself astute to those who are crafty.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: You save the humble, but your eyes watch the proud to bring them down.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: You, Lord, are my lamp. The Lord lights up my darkness.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: With you, I can charge down a troop of soldiers; with you, my God, I can climb a fortress wall.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: God's way is absolutely right.  What the Lord says is trustworthy. He is a shield to all who come to him for protection.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: For who is God except the Lord? Who is a Rock, except our God?
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: God makes me strong and keeps me safe.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: He makes me surefooted like the deer, able to walk the heights in safety.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: He teaches me how to fight in battle; he gives me the strength to draw a bronze bow.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: You protect me with the shield of your salvation; your help has made me great.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: You gave me room to walk, and prevented my feet from slipping.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I chased my enemies, and caught up with them. I did not turn around until I had destroyed them.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I struck them down—they couldn't get up. They fell at my feet.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: You made me strong for the battle; you made those who rose up against me kneel low before me.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: You made my enemies run away; I destroyed all my enemies.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: They cried out for help, but no one came to rescue them. They even called out to the Lord, but he did not answer them.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: I ground them into dust, like the dust of the earth. I crushed them and threw them out like mud in the street.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: You rescued me from rebellious people; you have kept me as ruler over nations—people I didn't know now serve me.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Foreigners cower before me; as soon as they hear of me, they obey.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: They lose heart, and come trembling in surrender from their strongholds.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: The Lord lives! Blessed be my Rock! May the God who saves me be praised!
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: God avenges me, he puts peoples under me,
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: He frees me from those who hate me. You keep me safe from those who rebel against me, you save me from violent men.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: That's why I will praise you among the nations, Lord; I will sing praises about who you are.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: You have saved the king so often,  showing your trustworthy love to David, your anointed, and to his descendants forever.
segments.speaker: Unknown
